notes: Bulk-generation-first candidate created with built-in imagegen. QA, legal/license review, final approval, and runtime integration deferred until all candidates exist. 2026-05-08 human approval: asset cleared for integration; runtime integration not yet performed.
final_prompt: Use case: stylized-concept; Asset type: hero portrait for Orbwalker; Primary request: production candidate hero bust portrait for the Orbwalker player character in a fantasy match-3 roguelike. Subject: hooded adventurer-mage orbwalker, confident but approachable, wearing dark leather and cloth with subtle gold trim, one hand holding a small glowing elemental orb. Style/medium: polished stylized 2D game character portrait, clean silhouette, mobile HUD readable. Composition/framing: bust portrait, three-quarter view, transparent-background cutout feel on simple neutral backdrop, no UI. Lighting/mood: heroic, magical, restrained, readable. Color palette: dark cloak, gold trim, cyan/orange elemental glow accents. Constraints: no readable text, no logo, no watermark, no copyrighted characters, no gore, no casino imagery, no excessive detail that fails at small portrait size.
